prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a dusty Saigon street corner at dawn, pushing into a rustic industrial coffee roastery. Warm cinematic morning lighting, photorealistic.
Macro slow-motion shot of dark brown glossy roasted Robusta coffee beans cascading and pouring down into a metal industrial hopper. Deep amber lighting, gritty cinematic feel.
Extreme close-up of extremely thick, rich, viscous golden-brown espresso crema slowing dripping down from a shiny metal portafilter. Incredible fluid dynamics, highly detailed.
A close up of a cold glass filled with large ice cubes, thick dark espresso is poured over the ice splashing satisfyingly. Dark moody background.
